MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.avatar_generator
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/avatar_generator.py (302 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Avatar Generator - Creates VTuber avatar using Gemini Nano Banana PRO
Generates Borg Cosmos avatar images with consistent character appearance

CLASSES:
- VTuberAvatarGenerator: Generates VTuber avatar images for Cosmos using the image generation system.

Cr
  Methods: async def generate_base_avatar(self, save_path: Optional[str]=None) -> Optional[bytes]
  Methods: async def generate_expression_set(self, output_dir: Optional[str]=None) -> dict
  Methods: async def generate_speaking_frames(self, num_frames: int=5, output_dir: Optional[str]=None) -> list
  Methods: def load_avatar_set(self, avatar_dir: Optional[str]=None) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def generate_vtuber_avatar(save_path: Optional[str]=None) -> Optional[bytes]
- async def generate_full_avatar_set(output_dir: Optional[str]=None) -> dict
